meta.description: On-demand interactive security-awareness E-LEARNING module. Trigger via Telegram (/elearning <topic>) or manually (form: topic, audience, pass mark, format, section images). AI writes a structured micro-course with a per-section illustrator "scene"; Generate Section Images renders one cinematic office image per section via the image provider (embedded as data URIs, graceful gradient fallback). Render builds one self-contained interactive lesson HTML (section hero images, nav, progress bar, scored knowledge check) that is SCORM-aware (feature-detects an LMS API and reports cmi.core.lesson_status + score). Writes an .html lesson and/or a SCORM 1.2 .zip (built by a pure-JS store writer) to /reports/awareness/elearning. Files-only; generic branding (CLIENT_NAME optional). No Gotenberg — interactive HTML, not PDF.

parameters.formDescription: Pick a topic and options, then submit. Produces an interactive HTML lesson and/or a SCORM package.

values.placeholder: Used if set / if Topic = Custom

values.option: Yes — illustrate each section with AI images

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 3500 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are an instructional designer creating a short interactive security-awareness e-learning module. For the given topic and audience produce a SINGLE valid JSON object. Keys: title; intro (2-3 sentences on why this matters to the learner and the organisation); sections (4-6 items, each {heading, body (2-4 short paragraphs separated by single newline characters), keyPoints (2-4 short bullet strings), scene (ONE vivid sentence describing a realistic modern-office scene that visually illustrates this section, written for an illustrator: describe the people, setting and action; do NOT mention any on-screen text, screens of text, or logos)}); questions (4-6 knowledge-check items, each {q, options (array of exactly 4 short strings), answer (0-based index of the correct option), why (one-sentence explanation)}). Plain, engaging, non-technical language tailored to the audience. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Create an interactive e-learning module on the topic: ' + ($json.topic || 'phishing') + '. Audience: ' + ($json.audience||'All staff') + '. Knowledge-check pass mark: ' + ($json.passMark||80) + '%.') }} } ]
}
